title: Create: Renewable Resources
description: Adds a bunch of recipes for normally non-renewable items
body:
A datapack (packaged as a mod) that makes normally non-renewable resources renewable with Create and adds some other miscellaneus recipies.
### Renewable Recipes
- Netherrack -> Cinder Flour
- Tuff -> Zinc, Copper etc.
### Other Recipes
- Cobbled deepslate
- (Pointed) Dripstone
- Crying Obsidian
- Calcite
- Rooted Dirt
